conversation.text: Hey, doing well! What's going on with your health that brought you here?
I hear you. What's the biggest thing bothering you right now?
No worries. Whenever you're ready to share what's going on health-wise, I'm here.
I'm good! Whenever you want to dig into what's going on with your health, just let me know.
Same as before, ready when you are. What's the health stuff you mentioned having a lot going on with?
oh are you annoyed with me
Not at all! Just here whenever you're ready. No rush.
Genuinely not annoyed. I'm just here for health questions, so there's not much I can do until you're ready to share what's going on. Take your time.
Ha, zero percent. I'm patient by nature. Whenever you're ready to talk health, I'm here.
